Diabetes Basics

Diabetes is a chronic health condition in this synthetic overview of a body's energy process.

Insulin helps blood sugar enter the cells in this fictional description of energy use.

Symptoms

Symptoms in the example may include thirst, urination, fatigue, and changes in vision.

What you can do

Talk with your doctor about the sample test, fictional options, and habits in this example.
